tldr: C21 complete (integration-smoke, Adam) — found 1 FAIL (login request-format contract mismatch). C22 pending (Aria, fix-login-request-format). No open handoffs. No blockers.
notes: C21 committed 2026-06-07 (69b7544). Adam ran full-stack smoke test: 15 PASS, 1 PASS-with-deviation (stale vendor data in dev DB, not a bug), 1 FAIL, 2 blocked + 1 not-verified (all downstream of the failure). FAIL: `loginApi` (frontend/src/api/auth.ts, built C17) POSTs form-urlencoded `username`/`password`; backend `LoginRequest` (backend/app/schemas/auth.py, built C10, correct per spec) expects JSON `{email, password}` — mismatch returns HTTP 422, surfaced as generic error. Backend is correct and must not change; fix is entirely in loginApi. Per C21's 'If Checks Fail' rule, this becomes its own fix-commit: C22 `fix-login-request-format` (Aria), spec written (commit-specs/commit-22.md) — single-file edit to frontend/src/api/auth.ts, switch to JSON body. Once C22 lands, re-run the four blocked/failed/not-verified C21 browser checks to close out Phase 1 verification. Adam also created a throwaway manager user (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) for role-check testing — decide whether to keep as a fixture or remove.
